title: Thurrock Council: Letter to the Leader of the Council (17 July 2025)
body: "A letter from Jim McMahon OBE, Minister of State for Local Government and English Devolution, to the Leader of Thurrock Council announcing the decision by the Secretary of State to issue new Directions on the Authority under section 15 of the Local Government Act 1999 extending the intervention until 30 April 2028. "
